rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANNE CLAIRE HALLBURG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Order Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate.
rulings.Rulings: The motion to vacate and set aside order determining persons entitled to distribution of estate is granted. Although the Court is not persuaded that the conduct of the co-administrators rises to the level of extrinsic fraud, the Court exercises its equitable powers to allow the UCSF Foundation an opportunity to present appropriate evidence at a later proceeding. See Estate of Kraus (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 103, 114 (probate court may apply general equitable principles in fashioning rememdies and granting relief in proceedings otherwise within their jurisdiction). The prevailing party must prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than October 21, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
